message:
chore(artifacts): update CI/conformance/e2e test artifacts after complex primitives expansion

Regenerated all test artifacts following the addition of 15 new lax conformance
cases covering complex number primitives (complex, conj, real, imag), conv1d_valid,
and scatter_overwrite operations.

Key changes across 202 artifact files:

- Parity report totals increased from 596 to 611 cases (all passing, 100% pass rate)
- Lax family grew from 343 to 358 matched cases with new sub-families:
  LaxComplex (3), LaxConj (3), LaxConv1dValid (3), LaxReal (2), LaxImag (2),
  LaxScatterOverwrite (2)
- Transform fixture bundle case count grew from 432 to 586 matched cases in
  dispatch pipeline and tolerance tightening e2e tests
- All timestamps updated to reflect current test run epoch
- Duration/timing values updated across unit test logs (fj-core, fj-trace,
  fj-interpreters, fj-conformance, fj-dispatch, fj-ad) with natural variance
- Dispatch-under-load latency percentiles updated (p50/p95/p99 improved)
- 8 golden journey timestamps refreshed (gj_01 through gj_08)
- CI synthetic-forensics-test manifest timestamps updated
- 9 new artifact files added: bench output log, durability proof/scrub report,
  legacy fixture rq file, and e2e stdout logs

All 611 conformance cases pass at 100% parity against jax-0.9.0.1 oracle.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
